<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [VegaDNS](https://github.com/shupp/VegaDNS-API) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/vegadns/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "vegadns"
  dnsCredentials:
    # SECRET_VEGADNS_KEY: API key
    vegadnsKey: ""
    # SECRET_VEGADNS_SECRET: API secret
    vegadnsSecret: ""
    # VEGADNS_URL: API endpoint URL
    url: ""
    # VEGADNS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 60)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # VEGADNS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 720)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # VEGADNS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 10)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
